ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the model was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset (in bytes) */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "model_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-dataset pair */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was linked to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "model_hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-hyperparameter pair */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was linked to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_hyperparameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_models" (
  "experiment_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-model pair */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was linked to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
